ddls:
CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the output file for the task */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the output file */,
  "np" INTEGER /* Number of processes (np) used */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Parameter n for the task */,
  "m" INTEGER /* Parameter m for the task */,
  "n_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks processed */,
  "i" INTEGER /* Index of the task execution */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Total execution time of the task in microseconds */,
  "n_tasks" INTEGER /* Number of tasks executed in this log entry */,
  "work" TEXT /* Total work done by the task */,
  "span" INTEGER /* Span of the task execution */,
  "busy" REAL /* Busy time during task execution */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the task was executed */,
  "memory_usage_peak" TEXT /* Peak memory usage during task execution */,
  "cpu_usage_peak" REAL /* Peak CPU usage during task execution */,
  "network_usage_peak" REAL /* Peak network usage during task execution */,
  "task_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message generated during task execution */,
  "additional_logs" TEXT /* Additional log details in a structured format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, operator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
